programme.desc: Set against the Alpine backdrop of Gstaad, the EFG Swiss Open Gstaad 2026 brings ATP 250 clay-court action to one of the Tour’s most distinctive venues, as players compete for the title and valuable ranking points in a historic Swiss tournament.

programme.title: Day 1 - ATP 250 Generali Open 2026
programme.desc: The Generali Open 2026 is an ATP 250 clay-court event held in Kitzbühel, Austria, from 20 to 25 July. Staged at the Kitzbühel Tennis Stadium and offering €612,620 in prize money, the tournament is one of the ATP Tour’s traditional Alpine stops, with players competing for the title on outdoor clay.

Staged at the Kitzbühel Tennis Stadium and offering €612,620 in prize money, the tournament is one of the ATP Tour’s traditional Alpine stops, with players competing for the title on outdoor clay.

programme.title: EN MLB Plays of the Week 2026 | E16
Premier Padel Highlights 2026 - Malaga P1
programme.desc: Highlights from the Miami P1, held in Miami, USA, from 22–29 March. Staged at the Miami Beach Convention Center, this Premier Padel P1 event features men’s and women’s main-draw action through to the finals. As a P1 tournament, it offers 1,000 ranking points to the winners and a total prize fund of €479,068.

programme.title: Freiburg vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Rayo Vallecano - UEFA Conference League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The UEFA Conference League is the third-tier club football tournament organised by UEFA. The new format competition runs for its second season live and exclusive only on beIN. The RB Arena in Leipzig, Germany, is the venue for the Conference League final on 27 May 2026.

programme.title: Atlético de Madrid vs Club Brugge - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Play-Offs -2nd leg
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. Paris Saint-Germain are the defending champions. The 2025/26 UEFA Champions League will be the second to be played under the new 36-team league phase. The final will be played on 30 May 2026 at Puskás Aréna in Budapest, Hungary.

programme.title: Bayer 04 Leverkusen vs Olympiacos - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Play-Offs -2nd leg
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. Paris Saint-Germain are the defending champions. programme.title: Leeds United vs Manchester City - English Premier League
programme.desc: Leeds have lost each of their last five Premier League games against Man City, having lost just four of their first 16 against them in the competition. Man City have won their last two away league games against Leeds – only once have they won three consecutively, doing so in their first three visits to Elland Road between 1924 and 1928.

programme.title: EPL The Big Interview 2025/2026
programme.desc: Extended sit-downs and more informal ‘out and about’ interviews with the Premier League’s biggest stars, providing players with a platform to tell their story in their own words.

programme.title: Fulham vs Tottenham Hotspur - English Premier League
programme.desc: Fulham are looking to complete the league double over Spurs for just the second time in their history, after the 2003-04 Premier League campaign. After winning seven consecutive away league games against Fulham between 2010 and 2023, Spurs have now lost their last two at Craven Cottage by an aggregate score of 5-0.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Chelsea - English Premier League
programme.desc: Arsenal have won their last three home league games against Chelsea, last winning more consecutively between 1990 and 1994. Chelsea are winless in their last eight Premier League games against Arsenal, their longest since a run of 19 between 1995 and 2005.

programme.title: EPL Stories 2025/2026 - Keep It in the Family
programme.desc: Showcasing the personalities who have shaped the Premier League era, in each episode we tell their unique story that will be sure to engage and entertain all fans.

programme.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Aston Villa - English Premier League
programme.desc: Wolves have won four of their last six Premier League home games against Aston Villa and are unbeaten in four since a 1-0 loss in December 2020. Aston Villa have won three of their last four Premier League games against Wolves, as many as in their previous 15. programme.title: Liverpool vs West Ham United - English Premier League
programme.desc: Liverpool have lost just one of their last 19 Premier League games against West Ham, winning seven of the last eight since a 3-2 away loss in November 2021. West Ham have won just one of their last 52 away league games against Liverpool, beating them 3-0 in August 2015 under Slaven Bilic.

programme.title: EPL Netbusters 2025/2026
programme.desc: Highlights of the Premier League Matchweek from an alternative angle. A look back at every goal from every game using the best ISOs and Slow Motion angles.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Crystal Palace - English Premier League
programme.desc: Following their 2-1 win at Selhurst Park in November, Manchester United are looking to complete their first league double over Crystal Palace since 2017-18. Crystal Palace have won four of their last six away league games against Manchester United, having won just two of their first 22 visits to Old Trafford.

programme.title: Newcastle United vs Everton - English Premier League
programme.desc: Newcastle are looking to complete the Premier League double over Everton for the sixth time. Only against Spurs have the Magpies done so against a side that many times. Everton won this exact fixture 1-0 last season, last winning away at Newcastle in consecutive seasons in 2012-13/2013-14.

programme.title: Day 1 - ATP 250 Millennium Estoril Open 2026
programme.desc: The Millennium Estoril Open 2026 marks the tournament’s return to ATP 250 status in Portugal, running from 20 to 26 July in Estoril. Played on clay, it stands as the country’s only ATP Tour event, bringing international players to one of Portugal’s leading tennis stages.

programme.title: Argentina vs Switzerland - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Quarter-final 4
programme.desc: Argentina have won both of their FIFA World Cup games against Switzerland, 2-0 in 1966 and 1-0 in 2014 in what was the last meeting between the sides in any competition. programme.title: Croatia vs Ghana - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Croatia and Ghana. Croatia are unbeaten in their four FIFA World Cup matches against African sides, scoring eight goals and conceding just one.

programme.title: Algeria vs Austria - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Algeria and Austria’s only previous encounter was in the group stage of the 1982 FIFA World Cup – Austria won 2-0, which was their last clean sheet at the tournament. Algeria’s only FIFA World Cup victory against European opposition came in their first ever World Cup match – 2-1 over West Germany in 1982. They’ve since gone eight games without a vi

programme.title: Germany vs Paraguay - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Round Of 32
programme.desc: This will be the third meeting between Germany and Paraguay, after Germany won a FIFA World Cup match 1-0 in 2002, and a 3-3 friendly draw in 2013. Germany have progressed from each of their last five FIFA World Cup knockout matches against South American nations since losing 2-0 to Brazil in the 2002 final. Paraguay, meanwhile, have lost all four

programme.title: Mexico vs Ecuador - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Round Of 32
programme.desc: Mexico and Ecuador have faced once before at the FIFA World Cup, with El Tri winning 2-1 in a group match in 2002. In all competitions, the two nations have drawn each of their last three meetings. Mexico have won just one of their 14 FIFA World Cup matches against South American sides – although that was their only game versus Ecuador in 2002. In

programme.title: Belgium vs Senegal - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Round Of 32
programme.desc: This will be the first ever meeting between Belgium and Senegal in any competition. Belgium have lost just one of their six games against African teams at the FIFA World Cup, losing 2-0 to Morocco in the group stage in 2022. None of those previous six matches happened in the knockout stages of the competition.

programme.title: United States vs Bosnia-Herzegovina - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Round Of 32
programme.desc: This will be the fourth meeting between USA and Bosnia and Herzegovina, with the Stars and Stripes unbeaten in the first three, all in friendlies from 2013 to 2021. USA have won just one of their last 21 FIFA World Cup meetings with UEFA nations, and are winless in their last 13 since a 3-2 victory over Portugal in 2002.

programme.title: Norway vs Senegal - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be Norway and Senegal’s first World Cup meeting. Their only previous encounter came in a March 2006 friendly in Dakar – Senegal won 2-1. Norway have faced African opposition just once before at the FIFA World Cup, drawing 2-2 with Morocco in 1998 after twice being behind on the scoresheet.

programme.title: Portugal vs Uzbekistan - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Portugal and Uzbekistan. Portugal are winless in their last two World Cup matches against teams from the AFC confederation – a 1-1 draw v Iran in 2018 and a 2-1 defeat v Korea Republic in 2022. Uzbekistan have won just one of their last 23 meetings with UEFA nations in all competitions, beating Kazakhst

programme.title: Scotland vs Brazil - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Brazil and Scotland will face each other in the FIFA World Cup for the fifth time. Only Argentina v Netherlands has been played more times since the 1974 edition. Scotland and Brazil’s first FIFA World Cup encounter was in 1974, ending in a goalless draw. Since then, Brazil have won their last three matches against Scotland at the tournament.

programme.title: Jordan vs Algeria - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be Jordan and Algeria’s first FIFA World Cup meeting. Their last encounter was a friendly in Algeria in May 2004 – it ended 1-1. After winning their first ever encounter 6-0 in the Arab Cup in October 1974, Algeria are winless in their two meetings with Jordan since, losing 2-1 in the Arab Cup in July 1988 as well as the aforementioned fr

programme.title: South Korea vs Czech Republic - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first FIFA World Cup encounter between Korea Republic and Czechia. Their three previous meetings all came in friendlies, resulting in one win apiece and one draw. The most recent clash occurred a decade ago in June 2016, a 2-1 victory for Korea Republic in Prague. This will be Korea Republic’s 12th FIFA World Cup tournament, the mo

programme.title: Canada vs Bosnia and Herzegovina - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Canada and Bosnia-Herzegovina. The 2026 tournament will mark Canada’s third appearance at the FIFA World Cup, after 1986 and 2022 – as such, it’s the first time they have qualified for back-to-back tournaments.

programme.title: United States vs Paraguay - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the second FIFA World Cup meeting between the United States and Paraguay. Their only previous encounter came in 1930, when USA won 3-0 – a match that featured the first hat-trick in World Cup history, scored by Bert Patenaude. It is also the USA’s joint-largest win at the competition. The 2026 FIFA World Cup will be the USA’s 12th appe

programme.title: Qatar vs Switzerland - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be Qatar and Switzerland’s first FIFA World Cup meeting. Their only previous encounter came in a November 2018 friendly in Lugano – Qatar won 1-0 thanks to an Akram Afif goal. This will be Qatar’s second FIFA World Cup, but it’s the first time they had to qualify for the tournament – their previous participation in 2022 came as hosts. The

programme.title: Brazil vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Brazil and Morocco will meet at the FIFA World Cup for the second time, after a 3-0 win for Brazil in the 1998 group stage – a match that featured Ronaldo and Rivaldo’s first World Cup goals. Brazil and Morocco’s only encounter since their last FIFA World Cup meeting was in a March 2023 friendly, in Tunisia – it ended 2-1 to Morocco.

programme.title: Haiti vs Scotland - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Haiti and Scotland, and Haiti’s first against an opponent from the British Isles. Scotland are winless in their last nine FIFA World Cup encounters with sides from the Americas. This run includes their only previous meeting with CONCACAF opposition: a 1-0 defeat to Costa Rica in 1990.

programme.title: Australia vs Türkiye - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the third encounter between Australia and Türkiye, following two friendly victories for Türkiye in May 2004. Türkiye have won all four of their FIFA World Cup matches against teams from the AFC confederation, scoring 14 goals and conceding only two in the process.

programme.title: Germany vs Curacao - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Germany and Curaçao. Germany have won 14 of their last 17 FIFA World Cup matches against teams from the Americas. Germany have won the FIFA World Cup four times, the joint-most for a European nation alongside Italy. Overall, only Brazil have lifted the trophy on more occasions.

programme.title: Netherlands vs Japan - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Netherlands and Japan are meeting at the FIFA World Cup for the second time – their first encounter came in the 2010 group stage, where the Dutch won 1-0 with a goal from Wesley Sneijder. Overall, Japan have never beaten the Netherlands. Japan went unbeaten against European opposition at the last FIFA World Cup, beating Germany and Spain in the gro

programme.title: Ivory Coast vs Ecuador - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever meeting between Côte d'Ivoire and Ecuador. Côte d'Ivoire have lost all three of their previous FIFA World Cup matches against teams from CONMEBOL: Argentina in 2006, Brazil in 2010 and Colombia in 2014. programme.title: Belgium vs Egypt - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Belgium and Egypt will meet at the FIFA World Cup for the first time. Their four previous encounters were all friendlies, with Egypt winning three and Belgium one. Belgium and Egypt’s last encounter came in a November 2022 friendly – Egypt won 2-1 in Kuwait City.

programme.title: Saudi Arabia vs Uruguay - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Saudi Arabia and Uruguay are meeting at the FIFA World Cup for the second time. Their first encounter came in the 2018 group stage, where Uruguay won 1-0 with a goal from Luis Suárez. Saudi Arabia have a balanced FIFA World Cup record against CONMEBOL teams, with one win and one defeat.

programme.title: Iran vs New Zealand - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Iran and New Zealand will meet at the FIFA World Cup for the first time. Their two previous encounters ended in a 0-0 draw and a 3-0 win for Iran.
